data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the Abandoned Booking Recovery sequence, which includes specific messages sent at defined intervals after cart abandonment. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of these messages being triggered or sent, nor does it show the existence of a campaign that implements this sequence. The absence of any related steps or evidence directly supporting the messaging timeline results in a gap in fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the messaging sequence for abandoned booking recovery.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
